title: How I built an AI call notetaker that runs 24/7 on Railway
excerpt: I was tired of manually reviewing HubSpot call recordings. So I built a system that polls for new calls every 5 minutes, transcribes with Deepgram, extracts BANT with GPT-4o, and pushes insights back to the deal — fully automated. Here's the full architecture.

title: From a prospect CSV to a full outreach pipeline in 60 seconds
excerpt: Pipeline AI takes a raw CSV and returns AI lead scores, personalised email sequences for each prospect, and discovery call scripts — all with human review gates before anything sends. Here's how I built the scoring and personalisation logic.

title: DeepAccount: B2B account intelligence in seconds, not hours
excerpt: Paste a company URL and your ICP criteria. DeepAccount scrapes live web data, scores the account fit, builds buyer personas, surfaces key objections, and writes a cold opener — all in under 10 seconds. The architecture behind it.
